heading: Strength and distribution in grade
label: 3004 Strength and distribution in grade
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 853a of this titlePub. L. 107–372
Amendments2020— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section established strength and distribution of officers in grades.Pub. L. 116–259
amendments: Amendments2020— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section established strength and distribution of officers in grades.Pub. L. 116–259

children.heading: Grade distribution
children.label: b Grade distribution
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe, with respect to the distribution on the lineal list in grade, the percentages applicable to the grades set forth in subsection (a).

children.heading: Annual computation of number in grade
children.label: c Annual computation of number in grade

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not less frequently than once each year, the Secretary shall make a computation to determine the number of officers on the lineal list authorized to be serving in each grade.

children.heading: Method of computation
children.label: 2 Method of computation
children.text: The number in each grade shall be computed by applying the applicable percentage to the total number of such officers serving on active duty on the date the computation is made.

children.heading: Fractions
children.label: 3 Fractions
children.text: If a final fraction occurs in computing the authorized number of officers in a grade, the nearest whole number shall be taken. If the fraction is one-half, the next higher whole number shall be taken.

children.heading: Temporary increase in numbers
children.label: d Temporary increase in numbers
children.text: The total number of officers authorized by law to be on the lineal list during a fiscal year may be temporarily exceeded if the average number on that list during that fiscal year does not exceed the authorized number.

children.heading: Positions of importance and responsibility
children.label: e Positions of importance and responsibility
children.text: Officers serving in positions designated under and officers recalled from retired status shall not be counted when computing authorized strengths under subsection (c) and shall not count against those strengths.section 3028(a) of this title

children.heading: Preservation of grade and pay
children.label: f Preservation of grade and pay
children.text: No officer may be reduced in grade or pay or separated from the commissioned officer corps of the Administration as the result of a computation made to determine the authorized number of officers in the various grades.
